description: CompositionBlue printed shorts with white and black stripes, made of 100% polyester, has belt loops on the waistband, a velcro closure, one pocket on the lower right side with a velcro closure and branding patch on the left side on the front extending to the backFitRegularWash careMachine wash separately with like coloursDo not bleach or dry cleanLine dry or tumble dry immediately after washingCool ironGet ready for the outdoors with these walking shorts from super cool surfing brand quiksilver. The fabric will keep you feeling fresh and comfortable all day while the big practical pocket adds style appeal. Team this with a bright tee and comfy footwear for a happy, casual outing with your pals.Model statisticsThe product is a size 33 on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
